key_numbers.target_inclusion_rule: All rows with source_domain == 'this_work' in master_molecule_table.csv are included.

exclusions_or_filters: The figure shows ALL 155 target-domain molecules (Hz, 5AP, BN-PAH); no fosc / energy / scaffold filter is applied at the target-library level.
Background scaffold families (pollice_heptazine_deriv: 1719, literature: 150, reference: 2) are shown for context but are NOT part of the target-domain screening pool.
Validated subset (n = 35) is a strict subset of the target library; molecules without ADC(2) validation are not annotated as validated.
visualization_caveats: State explicitly in the caption: "All 155 target-domain molecules are included; no fosc / energy / scaffold filter is applied to this panel."
Counts per scaffold family must match canonical_metrics.library.target_scaffold_counts: {'Hz': 90, '5AP': 55, 'BN-PAH': 10}.
The 2026-molecule master library is larger than the 155-molecule target library; do not conflate the two denominators.
manuscript_claims_allowed: The target screening library comprises 155 molecules across 3 scaffold families ({'Hz': 90, '5AP': 55, 'BN-PAH': 10}).
The full master library has 2026 rows; the source dataset has 3444 rows with 446 Pollice ADC(2)-labeled source-domain molecules (plus 19 pre-Round-1 labelled target molecules).
All 155 target molecules are visualised in this figure without additional filtering.
manuscript_claims_not_allowed: Do not state "155 target molecules were filtered/screened" — Fig 6 shows the full target library.
Do not use the 2026-row master library or 3444-row source dataset as the denominator for target-library percentages.
Do not equate "validated" (n = 35) with "target-domain" (n = 155); the former is a sub-selection of the latter.
